text.title: capacity-bottleneck-checklist Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the checklist artefact this methodology produces, with valid and invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "cap-2026-05-23", "owner": "@ruslan", "decision": "raise pgbouncer pool from 80 to 200; provision +2 web replicas", "rationale": "db pool saturation observed at 95% during last load test (load-test-2026-05-22.html); web CPU p95 at 78%; both inputs cited inline", "inputs_used": [ "observability/load-test-2026-05-22.html", "observability/web-cpu-p95.json" ], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "headroom_pct": 22, "bottlenecks": [ "db_pool", "web_cpu" ] }

example.note: owner='team' (r3); decision too short; rationale empty/defensive; inputs_used empty; version not semver; headroom below 20%.

section.title: Forbidden
section.forbidden: rationale that does not cite any input by name.
inputs_used empty AND decision is not 'no-op'.
duplicate artefact_id within the same store.
